FR-001.title: The application MUST render any well-formed markdown file the OS user can read, with mermaid, KaTeX, GFM alerts, wikilinks, and code highlighting.
FR-001.description: The application MUST render any well-formed markdown file the OS user can read, with mermaid, KaTeX, GFM alerts, wikilinks, and code highlighting.

FR-002.title: The application MUST sanitize markdown-derived HTML through DOMPurify before injecting it into the renderer DOM.
FR-002.description: The application MUST sanitize markdown-derived HTML through DOMPurify before injecting it into the renderer DOM.

FR-003.title: The application MUST re-sanitize mermaid SVG output before injecting it into the DOM. *(Closes SEC-001 / MOD-001.)*
FR-003.description: The application MUST re-sanitize mermaid SVG output before injecting it into the DOM. *(Closes SEC-001 / MOD-001.)*

FR-004.title: The application MUST reject image src that resolves outside the document's directory (or a configured allowlist). *(Closes SEC-002 / MOD-002.)*
FR-004.description: The application MUST reject image src that resolves outside the document's directory (or a configured allowlist). *(Closes SEC-002 / MOD-002.)*

FR-005.title: The application MUST scope DOMPurify's `style` attribute to a CSS allowlist that prohibits `url()` and `@import`. *(Closes SEC-003 / MOD-003.)*
FR-005.description: The application MUST scope DOMPurify's `style` attribute to a CSS allowlist that prohibits `url()` and `@import`. *(Closes SEC-003 / MOD-003.)*

FR-006.title: The renderer MUST set a Content Security Policy that blocks all network egress (`connect-src 'none'`), frames, and external scripts. *(Closes SEC-007 / MOD-006.)*
FR-006.description: The renderer MUST set a Content Security Policy that blocks all network egress (`connect-src 'none'`), frames, and external scripts. *(Closes SEC-007 / MOD-006.)*

FR-007.title: The application MUST emit a clear error affordance when YAML front-matter parsing fails, instead of silently dropping the document. *(Closes SEC-004 / MOD-004.)*
FR-007.description: The application MUST emit a clear error affordance when YAML front-matter parsing fails, instead of silently dropping the document. *(Closes SEC-004 / MOD-004.)*

FR-008.title: The application MUST persist its debug log at `os.tmpdir() / mdv-bun.log` and rotate at 10 MB. *(Closes SEC-005 / MOD-005.)*
FR-008.description: The application MUST persist its debug log at `os.tmpdir() / mdv-bun.log` and rotate at 10 MB. *(Closes SEC-005 / MOD-005.)*

FR-009.title: The Windows installer and macOS .app bundle MUST be code-signed and (macOS) notarized. *(Closes ENH-020 / ENH-021.)*
FR-009.description: The Windows installer and macOS .app bundle MUST be code-signed and (macOS) notarized. *(Closes ENH-020 / ENH-021.)*

FR-010.title: The distribution MUST include a `THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md` reachable from `Help → License…`. *(Closes DEBT-002 / MOD-008.)*
FR-010.description: The distribution MUST include a `THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md` reachable from `Help → License…`. *(Closes DEBT-002 / MOD-008.)*

FR-011.title: CI MUST run a dependency vulnerability scan (OSV or `bun audit`) on every PR. *(Closes SCA-002 / MOD-009.)*
FR-011.description: CI MUST run a dependency vulnerability scan (OSV or `bun audit`) on every PR. *(Closes SCA-002 / MOD-009.)*

FR-012.title: A Playwright domain test suite MUST exist with at least: (a) golden-render fixtures for mermaid+KaTeX+alerts+wikilinks; (b) hostile-content fixtures for SEC-001..007. *(Closes ENH-014 / ENH-015.)*
FR-012.description: A Playwright domain test suite MUST exist with at least: (a) golden-render fixtures for mermaid+KaTeX+alerts+wikilinks; (b) hostile-content fixtures for SEC-001..007. *(Closes ENH-014 / ENH-015.)*

FR-013.title: The application MUST gain a multi-format editor (Notepad++-class) that allows editing markdown and other text formats in tabbed views.
FR-013.description: The application MUST gain a multi-format editor (Notepad++-class) that allows editing markdown and other text formats in tabbed views.

NFR-001.title: A 50 KB markdown document with 20 mermaid blocks renders in ≤ 1.5 s on M1 / Ryzen 5 hardware.
NFR-001.description: A 50 KB markdown document with 20 mermaid blocks renders in ≤ 1.5 s on M1 / Ryzen 5 hardware.

NFR-002.title: Theme toggle on a 50 KB document completes in ≤ 200 ms (NEW: cached parse tree, MOD-007).
NFR-002.description: Theme toggle on a 50 KB document completes in ≤ 200 ms (NEW: cached parse tree, MOD-007).

NFR-003.title: Memory footprint ≤ 250 MB resident with 5 documents in Recent and a 1000-file folder open.
NFR-003.description: Memory footprint ≤ 250 MB resident with 5 documents in Recent and a 1000-file folder open.

NFR-004.title: The application MUST NOT make ANY outbound network request unless the user explicitly invokes "Check for updates" (ENH-018, deferred).
NFR-004.description: The application MUST NOT make ANY outbound network request unless the user explicitly invokes "Check for updates" (ENH-018, deferred).

NFR-005.title: All security findings of severity ≥ medium MUST close before public distribution.
NFR-005.description: All security findings of severity ≥ medium MUST close before public distribution.

NFR-006.title: License attribution MUST be visible from `Help → License…`.
NFR-006.description: License attribution MUST be visible from `Help → License…`.

TR-OPS-001.title: Crash diagnostics: a single combined log file with rotation; user can copy via `Help → Save crash report…` (deferred to ENH-019 / M4).
TR-OPS-001.description: Crash diagnostics: a single combined log file with rotation; user can copy via `Help → Save crash report…` (deferred to ENH-019 / M4).

TR-OPS-002.title: Telemetry: NONE by default. No external network calls without explicit user opt-in.
TR-OPS-002.description: Telemetry: NONE by default. No external network calls without explicit user opt-in.

TR-OPS-003.title: Update channel: opt-in. If enabled, single HTTPS HEAD request to a versioned manifest URL once per launch. (Deferred ENH-018.)
TR-OPS-003.description: Update channel: opt-in. If enabled, single HTTPS HEAD request to a versioned manifest URL once per launch. (Deferred ENH-018.)

TR-OPS-004.title: Crash recovery: on bun-process exit, renderer shows non-blocking banner "Backend unavailable — restart Markdown Viewer". (ENH-013.)
TR-OPS-004.description: Crash recovery: on bun-process exit, renderer shows non-blocking banner "Backend unavailable — restart Markdown Viewer". (ENH-013.)

TR-BUILD-001.title: macOS arm64 + x64 builds via `electrobun build --release`. Notarized + stapled.
TR-BUILD-001.description: macOS arm64 + x64 builds via `electrobun build --release`. Notarized + stapled.

TR-BUILD-002.title: Windows x64 build via `electrobun build --release` then Inno Setup. Code-signed `.exe` + signed installer.
TR-BUILD-002.description: Windows x64 build via `electrobun build --release` then Inno Setup. Code-signed `.exe` + signed installer.

TR-BUILD-003.title: Linux build (deferred): tar.gz + .deb + AppImage. Out of M1/M2 scope.
TR-BUILD-003.description: Linux build (deferred): tar.gz + .deb + AppImage. Out of M1/M2 scope.

TR-BUILD-004.title: CI matrix: macOS-latest + windows-latest. Both run `bun audit` and the Playwright domain suite.
TR-BUILD-004.description: CI matrix: macOS-latest + windows-latest. Both run `bun audit` and the Playwright domain suite.

TR-INFRA-001.title: No backend services, no databases, no caches. The app is fully local.
TR-INFRA-001.description: No backend services, no databases, no caches. The app is fully local.

TR-INFRA-002.title: The CoBolt-generated `_cobolt-docker/docker-compose.yml` is dev-only and is NOT shipped in the distribution. (See OPS-001 — outside-app remediation.)
TR-INFRA-002.description: The CoBolt-generated `_cobolt-docker/docker-compose.yml` is dev-only and is NOT shipped in the distribution. (See OPS-001 — outside-app remediation.)

TR-INFRA-003.title: Update manifest hosting: GitHub Releases or static CDN, served over HTTPS. (Deferred to ENH-018.)
TR-INFRA-003.description: Update manifest hosting: GitHub Releases or static CDN, served over HTTPS. (Deferred to ENH-018.)

TR-DATA-001.title: Persistent user data: `recent.json` (max 20 entries), EULA marker, sidebar-w localStorage. NO PII. NO PHI. NO regulated data.
TR-DATA-001.description: Persistent user data: `recent.json` (max 20 entries), EULA marker, sidebar-w localStorage. NO PII. NO PHI. NO regulated data.

TR-DATA-002.title: The bun debug log MUST NOT include user file contents — only paths, timestamps, render-counter telemetry, error messages.
TR-DATA-002.description: The bun debug log MUST NOT include user file contents — only paths, timestamps, render-counter telemetry, error messages.

TR-DATA-003.title: EULA marker file MUST be created with `0644` permissions (not world-writable) on Linux/macOS.
TR-DATA-003.description: EULA marker file MUST be created with `0644` permissions (not world-writable) on Linux/macOS.

TR-DATA-004.title: `Export to HTML` writes to a user-chosen folder; filename is sanitized to `[A-Za-z0-9._-]`.
TR-DATA-004.description: `Export to HTML` writes to a user-chosen folder; filename is sanitized to `[A-Za-z0-9._-]`.

IR-01-01.title: Empty document renders an empty content pane (not an error)
IR-01-01.description: Empty document renders an empty content pane (not an error)

IR-01-02.title: UTF-8 BOM at start of file is stripped before render
IR-01-02.description: UTF-8 BOM at start of file is stripped before render

IR-01-03.title: Files >10 MB render with a "large file" warning + bypass mermaid auto-render
IR-01-03.description: Files >10 MB render with a "large file" warning + bypass mermaid auto-render

IR-01-04.title: Read-only files render without trying to watch (file watch error logged but UI continues)
IR-01-04.description: Read-only files render without trying to watch (file watch error logged but UI continues)

IR-01-05.title: Network drives / removable media: file watcher MUST fall back to poll if `fs.watch` errors
IR-01-05.description: Network drives / removable media: file watcher MUST fall back to poll if `fs.watch` errors

IR-02-01.title: Sanitization MUST NOT break legitimate KaTeX `...` markup
IR-02-01.description: Sanitization MUST NOT break legitimate KaTeX `...` markup

IR-02-02.title: Sanitization MUST preserve the `data-mermaid-src-b64` attribute through the markdown→DOMPurify pass (mermaid renders later)
IR-02-02.description: Sanitization MUST preserve the `data-mermaid-src-b64` attribute through the markdown→DOMPurify pass (mermaid renders later)

IR-02-03.title: Sanitization MUST NOT strip relative `<a href="other.md">` links (used by internal-md routing)
IR-02-03.description: Sanitization MUST NOT strip relative `<a href="other.md">` links (used by internal-md routing)

IR-02-04.title: After mermaid SVG sanitize, mermaid pan/zoom (svg-pan-zoom) MUST still attach correctly to the SVG element
IR-02-04.description: After mermaid SVG sanitize, mermaid pan/zoom (svg-pan-zoom) MUST still attach correctly to the SVG element

IR-04-01.title: Containment must work on Windows where `C:\Users\me\notes\` and `C:/Users/me/notes/` are both valid path separators
IR-04-01.description: Containment must work on Windows where `C:\Users\me\notes\` and `C:/Users/me/notes/` are both valid path separators

IR-04-02.title: Symlinks: the resolved real-path must be under docDir (not just the lexical parent) — use `realpath` or `fs.realpathSync`
IR-04-02.description: Symlinks: the resolved real-path must be under docDir (not just the lexical parent) — use `realpath` or `fs.realpathSync`

IR-04-03.title: Junction points on Windows: same as symlinks
IR-04-03.description: Junction points on Windows: same as symlinks

IR-04-04.title: When the user opens a folder, ALL files in that folder tree are within the allowlist (so `[](sibling/file.md)` works)
IR-04-04.description: When the user opens a folder, ALL files in that folder tree are within the allowlist (so `[](sibling/file.md)` works)

IR-04-05.title: When the user opens a single file (not via folder), only files in that file's directory are allowed
IR-04-05.description: When the user opens a single file (not via folder), only files in that file's directory are allowed

IR-06-01.title: KaTeX inline `<style>` from `katex.min.css` MUST work (fonts loaded via local `views/mainview/katex/fonts/`)
IR-06-01.description: KaTeX inline `<style>` from `katex.min.css` MUST work (fonts loaded via local `views/mainview/katex/fonts/`)

IR-06-02.title: mermaid generated styles MUST work (it injects per-diagram CSS)
IR-06-02.description: mermaid generated styles MUST work (it injects per-diagram CSS)

IR-06-03.title: The `bun.spawn` calls for `openExternal` are out-of-process and unaffected by renderer CSP
IR-06-03.description: The `bun.spawn` calls for `openExternal` are out-of-process and unaffected by renderer CSP

IR-06-04.title: Future ENH-018 update-check requires CSP exception (or move check to bun process — preferred)
IR-06-04.description: Future ENH-018 update-check requires CSP exception (or move check to bun process — preferred)

IR-07-01.title: Error banner is dismissible (does not occupy permanent space if user clicks away)
IR-07-01.description: Error banner is dismissible (does not occupy permanent space if user clicks away)

IR-07-02.title: Error message must NOT include the offending YAML body (could contain user secrets they didn't realize were in the file)
IR-07-02.description: Error message must NOT include the offending YAML body (could contain user secrets they didn't realize were in the file)

IR-07-03.title: The body of the document still renders (front-matter region treated as not-front-matter on parse failure)
IR-07-03.description: The body of the document still renders (front-matter region treated as not-front-matter on parse failure)

IR-08-01.title: Concurrent appends from multiple bun processes (if user launches twice) must not corrupt the log; use process-id scoped log files OR rely on append-atomicity of small writes
IR-08-01.description: Concurrent appends from multiple bun processes (if user launches twice) must not corrupt the log; use process-id scoped log files OR rely on append-atomicity of small writes

IR-08-02.title: Rotation rotates atomically (rename + reopen) — no log lost during rotation
IR-08-02.description: Rotation rotates atomically (rename + reopen) — no log lost during rotation

IR-08-03.title: If `os.tmpdir()` is read-only (rare CI / sandboxed env), bun MUST fall back to silent/in-memory and surface a one-time renderer warning
IR-08-03.description: If `os.tmpdir()` is read-only (rare CI / sandboxed env), bun MUST fall back to silent/in-memory and surface a one-time renderer warning

IR-09-01.title: CI signing keys MUST be stored in encrypted secrets (GitHub Actions secrets); never in repo
IR-09-01.description: CI signing keys MUST be stored in encrypted secrets (GitHub Actions secrets); never in repo

IR-09-02.title: Notarization waits MUST not block dev PR builds (only release tags trigger notarization)
IR-09-02.description: Notarization waits MUST not block dev PR builds (only release tags trigger notarization)

IR-09-03.title: Signed installers MUST verify chain on the user's machine (Inno Setup auto-verifies on Windows; macOS Gatekeeper auto-verifies the .app)
IR-09-03.description: Signed installers MUST verify chain on the user's machine (Inno Setup auto-verifies on Windows; macOS Gatekeeper auto-verifies the .app)

IR-10-01.title: Generation MUST run from `bun.lock` (not `package.json` ranges) so versions are exact
IR-10-01.description: Generation MUST run from `bun.lock` (not `package.json` ranges) so versions are exact

IR-10-02.title: The file SHOULD link to source for each MIT/BSD/Apache/MPL dep
IR-10-02.description: The file SHOULD link to source for each MIT/BSD/Apache/MPL dep

IR-10-03.title: Help → License menu opens the file with the user's default `.md` viewer (which may be this app — circular but fine)
IR-10-03.description: Help → License menu opens the file with the user's default `.md` viewer (which may be this app — circular but fine)

IR-11-01.title: The scan MUST run on every PR, not just main
IR-11-01.description: The scan MUST run on every PR, not just main

IR-11-02.title: A new HIGH/CRITICAL CVE on existing deps MUST fail the build (so `--audit` runs in CI even on docs-only PRs)
IR-11-02.description: A new HIGH/CRITICAL CVE on existing deps MUST fail the build (so `--audit` runs in CI even on docs-only PRs)

IR-11-03.title: A waiver mechanism MUST exist for known false positives (file at `.security-waivers.json` with cve, expiry-date, justification)
IR-11-03.description: A waiver mechanism MUST exist for known false positives (file at `.security-waivers.json` with cve, expiry-date, justification)

IR-12-01.title: Test fixtures live in `e2e/fixtures/` with subdirs `golden/`, `hostile/`, `regressions/`
IR-12-01.description: Test fixtures live in `e2e/fixtures/` with subdirs `golden/`, `hostile/`, `regressions/`

IR-12-02.title: Each hostile fixture MUST assert that NO file content is leaked into the rendered DOM
IR-12-02.description: Each hostile fixture MUST assert that NO file content is leaked into the rendered DOM

IR-12-03.title: Visual regression baseline images live in `e2e/snapshots/` and update via `bun test --update-snapshots`
IR-12-03.description: Visual regression baseline images live in `e2e/snapshots/` and update via `bun test --update-snapshots`

IR-12-04.title: Tests run in CI on macOS-latest + windows-latest; Linux deferred
IR-12-04.description: Tests run in CI on macOS-latest + windows-latest; Linux deferred

IR-13-01.title: Editor and preview MUST share the same DOMPurify sanitize boundary
IR-13-01.description: Editor and preview MUST share the same DOMPurify sanitize boundary

IR-13-02.title: Save MUST atomically replace the file (write tmp → rename) to avoid partial writes on crash
IR-13-02.description: Save MUST atomically replace the file (write tmp → rename) to avoid partial writes on crash

IR-13-03.title: If the file changed on disk while editor is open, prompt the user before saving (avoid clobber)
IR-13-03.description: If the file changed on disk while editor is open, prompt the user before saving (avoid clobber)

IR-13-04.title: Autosave does NOT save on crash recovery without explicit user confirm
IR-13-04.description: Autosave does NOT save on crash recovery without explicit user confirm

IR-13-05.title: Format adapters MUST NOT execute user content as code (no `eval`, no dynamic imports)
IR-13-05.description: Format adapters MUST NOT execute user content as code (no `eval`, no dynamic imports)

IR-X-001.title: Every RPC handler MUST log start + end (with duration) for debug builds
IR-X-001.description: Every RPC handler MUST log start + end (with duration) for debug builds

IR-X-002.title: RPC errors MUST be reflected to the renderer, never silently swallowed
IR-X-002.description: RPC errors MUST be reflected to the renderer, never silently swallowed

IR-X-003.title: Hot-reload during dev (`electrobun dev --watch`) MUST not leak file watchers (close on hot-reload)
IR-X-003.description: Hot-reload during dev (`electrobun dev --watch`) MUST not leak file watchers (close on hot-reload)

IR-X-004.title: The bun process exits cleanly on app-quit (release watchers, write recent.json)
IR-X-004.description: The bun process exits cleanly on app-quit (release watchers, write recent.json)

IR-X-005.title: All UI strings are constants in the source (M3 i18n-readiness — strings not yet externalized but isolated in a way that allows future externalization)
IR-X-005.description: All UI strings are constants in the source (M3 i18n-readiness — strings not yet externalized but isolated in a way that allows future externalization)
